name: basalt
description: Design-system companion for basalt-ui (Mantine v9 + visx). Owns the chart/design doctrine consolidated out of argo DESIGN.md, dotfiles visx-charts, and the dataviz skill. Provides /basalt:design (doctrine + theme-lab loop), /basalt:charts (adding charts, Rule-of-Three kinds, consumer series), and /basalt:app (guided scaffold around 'basalt init').
